notes: L11 Part 2 (act 68) 'Meet PIMA: Your Right Hand's Job Assignment', 330.53s, 3 cues. Uses guitar.py (StringSet, pima_row, finger_legend, assign_arrow, region_brace). READ start/mid/end each cue; accumulate+hold, mid==end. 1 smoke fix (Cue01 assign arrowheads overlapped string labels + cramped chips -> assign_arrow lands on string, gap 0.72, smaller chips); -ql clean. cue02 end frame re-extracted via ffmpeg (render-script end-grab missed the segment's last chunk).

frames.notes: [start reveal] PIMA chips p(amber)/i(blue)/m(green)/a(violet) + four legends 'p = pulgar (thumb)', 'i = índice (index)', 'm = medio (middle)', 'a = anular (ring)'; 'four letters — the alphabet of fingerpicking'. Spanish names correct, legible.
